subheadline: Packages proof points, testimonials, and metrics into a polished trust layer that avoids filler.
left_description: A sharp, production-minded compare using shadcn-style rhythm, semantic tokens, and concise copy so evaluators can turn evidence into credibility at a glance.
right_description: A sharp, production-minded compare using shadcn-style rhythm, semantic tokens, and concise copy so evaluators can turn evidence into credibility at a glance.
right_points: Responsive cards tuned for real content
